name: Maya Chen
goals: Quickly generate rich, specific prompts that match her visual style and workflow
Explore combinations of artistic styles, lighting, and mood to break creative blocks
Build a personal library of prompt templates she can refine across projects
frustrations: Generic AI-generated prompts that produce bland or off-brand results
Having to remember and re-type the same stylistic modifiers for every session
No way to share a specific prompt configuration with collaborators or clients
relevant_behaviours: Uses Cortex Enigma at the start of each project to explore the visual direction before committing
Frequently toggles between lighting and medium categories to find contrast combinations
Copies the final expanded prompt directly into Midjourney or Stable Diffusion
Returns to the same selection state across sessions — expects persistence
